entities.name: uglify-js
entities.context: A JavaScript minification tool that supports ECMAScript.

entities.name: Babel
entities.context: A transpiler for processing ECMAScript source files.

entities.name: ECMAScript
entities.context: A scripting language specification that JavaScript is based on.

relationships.context: V uses uglify-js for JavaScript minification.
V mentions Babel for processing more exotic ECMAScript features.
Babel is used to process ECMAScript source files.
